title: Hyenas
summary: A hostile Washington faction recognizable by gas masks and, in later seasonal material, an expanding Spice operation tied to the Dark Zones.

claims.text: Ubisoft identifies the gasmask-wearing Hyenas as one of the hostile factions operating in Washington during The Division 2 campaign.
The Into the Dark season places the Hyenas behind Potent Spice experiments and material movement through the Toxic Dark Zone.
The Pact treats the Hyenas as an active faction with its own Retaliation rewards and faction-specific materials.

paragraphs.text: The Hyenas are part of the original hostile faction landscape in Washington and remain active in later seasons.
Later official material connects the group to Potent Spice production and chemical-material movement through a Toxic Dark Zone.

verification.notes: Founding history and leadership are withheld until direct collectible or mission evidence is inventoried.
